mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bom_item WHERE bom_id = #{bomId} AND is_delete = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bom_item (bom_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, quantity, loss_rate, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.bomId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.lossRate}, #{item.sortOrder})
